prestazioni: 4G63T (7-bolt) forged internals upgrade with Manley 87mm stroker crank, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and JE 8.5:1 compression forged pistons for 2.3L displacement, supporting 500+ WHP on E85

Garrett GTX3582R .82 A/R turbocharger with TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegate, custom 3-inch divorced downpipe, and Vibrant 1412 stainless steel V-band exhaust system with 3.5-inch piping and Burns Merge Collector

Haltech Elite 2500 standalone ECU with dual Bosch 0280158002 1000cc injectors, AEM 30-2012 wideband controller, and custom 4-layer wiring harness by Painless Performance for sequential fuel and ignition control
estetica: Veilside Fortune 03 widebody conversion with custom carbon fiber fenders, front bumper, and rear diffuser, retaining OEM pop-up headlights with Hella H4 100W bulbs and custom LED halo rings
Rocket Bunny V3 rear wing with custom 3D-printed aluminum mounts and adjustable carbon fiber endplates, paired with a custom front splitter using 5mm thick carbon-Kevlar hybrid weave for downforce

Work Meister S1 3P 17x9.5 +22 front and 17x10.5 +35 rear wheels with Toyo R888R 245/40/17 and 275/35/17 tires, paired with BC Racing BR coilovers with Swift springs and custom camber plates for -3.5 degrees front and -2.8 degrees rear
